calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Spletter appeared by telephone for Joshua Margulies.

The Court noted that there are no objections and granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Spletter appeared by telephone for Jeffrey Weidig.

The Court noted that there are no other appearances by any interested Parties. Mr. Spletter stated that the codicil is actually an amendment to the terms of the Trust, that there are no objections and that the Family members get along. Mr. Spletter also clarified that the value of the Vanguard stock should be $266,128.00 and that the amount of $66,128.00 in the petition was an error. The Court informed Counsel that he will need to amend/supplement the accounting petition to refelct the correction and serve a copy. The accounting petition was continued to October 21, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Spletter will appear by courtcall.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
